title: Newcomers: Housing in Canada - Canada.ca
content:
## Housing in Canada : Newcomers
Find out how newcomers can find safe and affordable places to live in Canada.
Get settled and start preparing for your new home.
Download this overview of housing in Canada in one of the languages below:
- English (PDF, 1.4 MB)
- French (PDF, 1.4 MB)
- Haitian Creole (PDF, 1.4 MB)
- Spanish (PDF, 1.4 MB)
